metadata.description: Local marketplace for persona-studio during development. Replace with public marketplace before distribution.

plugins.name: persona-studio
plugins.description: Build AI persona avatars from files (private) or names (celebrity), then run virtual meetings and debates with tmux split-panes agent teams. Includes a three-tier factual-grounding layer (corpus + Perplexity/WebSearch + CoVe) to catch hallucinations, Ralph satisfaction-score loop, and automatic Word/PowerPoint transcript generation.
